questions.domain: 領域 3：設計安全架構 (Design Secure Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司想要設定 Amazon Managed Grafana 作為其視覺化工具。該公司希望將其 Amazon RDS 資料庫中的資料視覺化為資料來源。該公司需要一個不會透過網路公開資料的安全解決方案。哪種解決方案可以滿足這些要求？
question_text.en: A company wants to set up Amazon Managed Grafana as its visualization tool. The company wants to visualize data from its Amazon RDS database as one data source. The company needs a secure solution that will not expose the data over the internet. Which solution will meet these requirements?

A.zh: 建立不帶 VPC 的 Amazon Managed Grafana 工作區。為 RDS 資料庫建立公共端點。將公共終端節點配置為 Amazon Managed Grafana 中的資料來源。
A.en: Create an Amazon Managed Grafana workspace without a VPC. Create a public endpoint for the RDS database. Configure the public endpoint as a data source in Amazon Managed Grafana.

B.zh: 在 VPC 中建立 Amazon Managed Grafana 工作區。為 RDS 資料庫建立專用端點。將私有終端節點配置為 Amazon Managed Grafana 中的資料來源。
B.en: Create an Amazon Managed Grafana workspace in a VPC. Create a private endpoint for the RDS database. Configure the private endpoint as a data source in Amazon Managed Grafana.

C.zh: 建立不含 VP 的 Amazon Managed Grafana 工作區建立 AWS PrivateLink 終端節點以在 Amazon Managed Grafana 和 Amazon RDS 之間建立連線。將 Amazon RDS 設定為 Amazon Managed Grafana 中的資料來源。
C.en: Create an Amazon Managed Grafana workspace without a VPCreate an AWS PrivateLink endpoint to establish a connection between Amazon Managed Grafana and Amazon RDS. Set up Amazon RDS as a data source in Amazon Managed Grafana.

D.zh: 在 VPC 中建立 Amazon Managed Grafana 工作區。為 RDS 資料庫建立公共端點。將公共終端節點配置為 Amazon Managed Grafana 中的資料來源。
D.en: Create an Amazon Managed Grafana workspace in a VPC. Create a public endpoint for the RDS database. Configure the public endpoint as a data source in Amazon Managed Grafana.

A.zh: 錯誤。建立公共端點會將資料暴露到網際網路，不滿足問題所要求的「不會將資料暴露到網際網路」的條件。
A.en: Incorrect. Creating a public endpoint will expose data to the Internet, which does not meet the condition of "no data will be exposed to the Internet" required by the question.

B.zh: 正確。在VPC中建立Grafana工作區，並使用私有端點連接RDS資料庫，以確保資料不會暴露在網路上並滿足問題要求。
B.en: Correct. Create a Grafana workspace in the VPC and use a private endpoint to connect to the RDS database to ensure that the data is not exposed to the Internet and meets the question requirements.

C.zh: 錯誤。Amazon Managed Grafana 工作區需要位於 VPC 才能使用 PrivateLink 連接到 RDS 資料庫。沒有 VPC 的工作空間無法直接使用 PrivateLink。
C.en: Incorrect. The Amazon Managed Grafana workspace needs to be in a VPC to use PrivateLink to connect to the RDS database. Workspaces without VPC cannot use PrivateLink directly.

D.zh: 錯誤。雖然Grafana工作區位於VPC中，但使用公共端點會將資料暴露到Internet，這不符合問題的要求。
D.en: Incorrect. Although the Grafana workspace is in a VPC, using a public endpoint will expose the data to the Internet, which does not meet the requirements of the question.

answer_text.zh: B. 在 VPC 中建立 Amazon Managed Grafana 工作區。為 RDS 資料庫建立專用端點。將私有終端節點配置為 Amazon Managed Grafana 中的資料來源。
answer_text.en: B. Create an Amazon Managed Grafana workspace in a VPC. Create a private endpoint for the RDS database. Configure the private endpoint as a data source in Amazon Managed Grafana.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：B (66%)； C (34%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：在VPC中建立Grafana工作區，並使用私有端點連接RDS資料庫，以確保資料不會暴露在網路上並滿足問題要求。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: B (66%); C (34%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Create a Grafana workspace in the VPC and use a private endpoint to connect to the RDS database to ensure that the data is not exposed to the Internet and meets the question requirements.

questions.domain: 領域 2：設計高性能架構 (Design High-Performing Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司在 Amazon S3 上託管資料湖。資料湖從各種資料來源取得 Apache Parquet 格式的資料。該公司使用多個轉換步驟來準備攝取的資料。這些步驟包括過濾異常、將資料標準化為標準日期和時間值以及產生用於分析的聚合。公司必須將轉換後的資料儲存在資料分析師存取的 S3 儲存桶中。該公司需要一個不需要程式碼的預先建置資料轉換解決方案。該解決方案必須提供數據沿襲和數據分析。公司需要與全公司員工分享資料轉換步驟。哪種解決方案可以滿足這些要求？
question_text.en: A company hosts a data lake on Amazon S3. The data lake ingests data in Apache Parquet format from various data sources. The company uses multiple transformation steps to prepare the ingested data. The steps include filtering of anomalies, normalizing of data to standard date and time values, and generation of aggregates for analyses. The company must store the transformed data in S3 buckets that data analysts access. The company needs a prebuilt solution for data transformation that does not require code. The solution must provide data lineage and data profiling. The company needs to share the data transformation steps with employees throughout the company. Which solution will meet these requirements?

A.zh: 設定 AWS Glue Studio 視覺畫布來轉換資料。使用 AWS Glue 作業與員工共用轉換步驟。
A.en: Configure an AWS Glue Studio visual canvas to transform the data. Share the transformation steps with employees by using AWS Glue jobs.

B.zh: 設定 Amazon EMR Serverless 以轉換資料。使用 EMR 無伺服器作業與員工分享轉型步驟。
B.en: Configure Amazon EMR Serverless to transform the data. Share the transformation steps with employees by using EMR Serverless jobs.

C.zh: 配置 AWS Glue DataBrew 以轉換資料。使用 DataBrew 配方與員工分享轉換步驟。
C.en: Configure AWS Glue DataBrew to transform the data. Share the transformation steps with employees by using DataBrew recipes.

D.zh: 為資料建立 Amazon Athena 表。編寫 Athena SQL 查詢來轉換資料。與員工共用 Athena SQL 查詢。
D.en: Create Amazon Athena tables for the data. Write Athena SQL queries to transform the data. Share the Athena SQL queries with employees.

A.zh: 錯誤。效能分析：AWS Glue Studio 提供了設計 ETL 作業的視覺化介面，但它主要用於建立和管理 AWS Glue 作業，並不是專為資料分析和資料分析而設計的無程式碼解決方案。錯誤原因：AWS Glue Studio 不直接支援資料分析和資料分析功能，也沒有提供類似 DataBrew 的「配方」功能來共享轉換步驟。
A.en: Incorrect. Performance analysis: AWS Glue Studio provides a visual interface for designing ETL jobs, but it is primarily used to create and manage AWS Glue jobs and is not a code-free solution specifically designed for data profiling and data analysis. Reason for the error: AWS Glue Studio does not directly support data profiling and data analysis functions, nor does it provide a "recipe" function like DataBrew to share transformation steps.

B.zh: 錯誤。效能分析：Amazon EMR Serverless 是一款功能強大的資料處理工具，適合執行大規模分散式運算任務。錯誤原因：EMR Serverless 需要編寫程式碼或腳本來定義資料轉換邏輯，屬於「無程式碼解決方案」，不符合問題的要求。此外，它不直接支援資料剖析和資料分析功能。
B.en: Incorrect. Performance analysis: Amazon EMR Serverless is a powerful data processing tool suitable for running large-scale distributed computing tasks. Reason for the error: EMR Serverless requires writing code or scripts to define data conversion logic, which is a "no code solution" that does not meet the requirements of the question. Additionally, it does not directly support data profiling and data analysis functions.

C.zh: 正確。效能分析：AWS Glue DataBrew 是一款專為資料準備而設計的無代理工具，支援資料轉換、資料分析和資料分析功能。其「配方」功能可輕鬆共享資料轉換步驟。 DataBrew完全滿足問題的要求，包括無程式碼解決方案、資料剖析、資料分析以及共享轉換步驟的能力。
C.en: Correct. Performance analysis: AWS Glue DataBrew is a proxy-free tool designed specifically for data preparation, supporting data transformation, data profiling, and data analysis functions. Its "recipe" feature makes it easy to share data transformation steps. DataBrew fully meets the requirements of the question, including code-free solution, data profiling, data analysis, and the ability to share transformation steps.

D.zh: 錯誤。分析分析：Amazon Athena 是一項互動式查詢服務，可使用 SQL 查詢分析 S3 中的資料。錯誤原因：Athena需要編寫SQL查詢，不符合問題作為「無代理解決方案」的要求。此外，它不直接支援資料剖析和資料分析功能。
D.en: Incorrect. Analytical analysis: Amazon Athena is an interactive query service that can analyze data in S3 using SQL queries. Reason for the error: Athena needs to write a SQL query, which does not meet the requirements of the question as a "no proxy solution". Additionally, it does not directly support data profiling and data analysis functions.

answer_text.zh: C. 配置 AWS Glue DataBrew 以轉換資料。使用 DataBrew 配方與員工分享轉換步驟。
answer_text.en: C. Configure AWS Glue DataBrew to transform the data. Share the transformation steps with employees by using DataBrew recipes.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：C (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：效能分析：AWS Glue DataBrew 是一款專為資料準備而設計的無代理工具，支援資料轉換、資料分析和資料分析功能。其「配方」功能可輕鬆共享資料轉換步驟。 DataBrew完全滿足問題的要求，包括無程式碼解決方案、資料剖析、資料分析以及共享轉換步驟的能力。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: C (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Performance analysis: AWS Glue DataBrew is a proxy-free tool designed specifically for data preparation, supporting data transformation, data profiling, and data analysis functions. Its "recipe" feature makes it easy to share data transformation steps. DataBrew fully meets the requirements of the question, including code-free solution, data profiling, data analysis, and the ability to share transformation steps.

questions.domain: 領域 2：設計高性能架構 (Design High-Performing Architectures)

question_text.zh: 解決方案架構師在位於應用程式負載平衡器 (ALB) 後面的各個目標群組中的多個 Amazon EC2 執行個體上執行 Web 應用程式。用戶可以透過公共網站存取該應用程式。解決方案架構師希望允許工程師使用網站的開發版本來存取特定的開發 EC2 執行個體來測試應用程式的新功能。解決方案架構師希望使用 Amazon Route 53 託管區域讓工程師能夠存取開發執行個體。即使開發實例被替換，解決方案也必須自動路由到開發實例。哪種解決方案可以滿足這些要求？
question_text.en: A solutions architect runs a web application on multiple Amazon EC2 instances that are in individual target groups behind an Application Load Balancer (ALB). Users can reach the application through a public website. The solutions architect wants to allow engineers to use a development version of the website to access one specific development EC2 instance to test new features for the application. The solutions architect wants to use an Amazon Route 53 hosted zone to give the engineers access to the development instance. The solution must automatically route to the development instance even if the development instance is replaced. Which solution will meet these requirements?

A.zh: 為開發網站建立 A 記錄，並將值設為 ALB。在 ALB 上建立偵聽器規則，將開發網站的請求轉送至包含開發實例的目標群組。
A.en: Create an A Record for the development website that has the value set to the ALB. Create a listener rule on the ALB that forwards requests for the development website to the target group that contains the development instance.

B.zh: 使用公用 IP 位址重新建立開發實例。為開發網站建立一條 A 記錄，其值設定為開發實例的公用 IP 位址。
B.en: Recreate the development instance with a public IP address. Create an A Record for the development website that has the value set to the public IP address of the development instance.

C.zh: 為開發網站建立 A 記錄，並將值設為 ALB。在ALB上建立監聽規則，將開發網站的請求重新導向到開發實例的公網IP位址。
C.en: Create an A Record for the development website that has the value set to the ALB. Create a listener rule on the ALB to redirect requests for the development website to the public IP address of the development instance.

D.zh: 將所有實例放入同一目標群組中。為開發網站建立 A 記錄。將值設為 ALB。在 ALB 上建立偵聽器規則，將開發網站的請求轉送至目標群組。
D.en: Place all the instances in the same target group. Create an A Record for the development website. Set the value to the ALB. Create a listener rule on the ALB that forwards requests for the development website to the target group.

A.zh: 正確。此選項使用 Route 53 的 A 記錄指向 ALB，並透過 ALB 的偵聽器規則將請求路由到特定目標群組。目標群組可以動態管理實例。即使更換開發實例，目標群組仍可自動更新實例資訊。滿足問題要求：自動將屬性轉移到開發實例，即使實例被取代。
A.en: Correct. This option uses Route 53's A record to point to the ALB and routes requests to a specific target group through the ALB's listener rules. The target group can dynamically manage instances. Even if the development instance is replaced, the target group can still automatically update instance information. Meets the question requirements: Automatically transfer the property to the development instance, even if the instance is replaced.

B.zh: 錯誤。連接到使用實例的公網IP位址不符合高可用性要求。若更換實例，公網IP位址會發生變化，導致DNS記錄失效。不符合題目要求：無法自動建立新的開發實例。
B.en: Incorrect. The public IP address connecting to the usage instance does not meet high availability requirements. If the instance is replaced, the public IP address will change, causing the DNS record to become invalid. Does not meet the question requirements: Unable to automatically create a new development instance.

C.zh: 錯誤。雖然使用了 ALB，但將請求重定向到實例的公共 IP 位址仍然存在問題。若更換實例，公網IP位址會發生變化，導致路線圖失敗。不符合題目要求：無法自動建立新的開發實例。
C.en: Incorrect. Although using ALB, there is still an issue with redirecting requests to the public IP address of the instance. If the instance is replaced, the public IP address will change, causing the roadmap to fail. Does not meet the question requirements: Unable to automatically create a new development instance.

D.zh: 錯誤。將所有實例放在同一目標群組中將導致開發實例和生產實例混合，並且無法將開發實例彼此分離。不符合問題要求：需要單獨的開發實例路線圖。
D.en: Incorrect. Placing all instances in the same target group will cause development instances and production instances to be mixed, and it will not be possible to separate development instances from each other. Does not meet the question requirements: requires a separate roadmap to the development instance.

answer_text.zh: A. 為開發網站建立 A 記錄，並將值設為 ALB。在 ALB 上建立偵聽器規則，將開發網站的請求轉送至包含開發實例的目標群組。
answer_text.en: A. Create an A Record for the development website that has the value set to the ALB. Create a listener rule on the ALB that forwards requests for the development website to the target group that contains the development instance.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：A (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：此選項使用 Route 53 的 A 記錄指向 ALB，並透過 ALB 的偵聽器規則將請求路由到特定目標群組。目標群組可以動態管理實例。即使更換開發實例，目標群組仍可自動更新實例資訊。滿足問題要求：自動將屬性轉移到開發實例，即使實例被取代。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: A (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: This option uses Route 53's A record to point to the ALB and routes requests to a specific target group through the ALB's listener rules. The target group can dynamically manage instances. Even if the development instance is replaced, the target group can still automatically update instance information. Meets the question requirements: Automatically transfer the property to the development instance, even if the instance is replaced.

questions.domain: 領域 2：設計高性能架構 (Design High-Performing Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司在公司資料中心的 Kubernetes 叢集上運行容器應用程式。該應用程式使用高級訊息佇列協定 (AMQP) 與訊息佇列進行通訊。資料中心的擴展速度不夠快，無法滿足公司不斷擴大的業務需求。該公司希望將工作負載遷移到 AWS。哪種解決方案能夠以最少的營運開銷滿足這些要求？
question_text.en: A company runs a container application on a Kubernetes cluster in the company's data center. The application uses Advanced Message Queuing Protocol (AMQP) to communicate with a message queue. The data center cannot scale fast enough to meet the company’s expanding business needs. The company wants to migrate the workloads to AWS. Which solution will meet these requirements with the LEAST operational overhead?

A.zh: 將容器應用程式移轉到 Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS)。使用 Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) 擷取訊息。
A.en: Migrate the container application to Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS). Use Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) to retrieve the messages.

B.zh: 將容器應用程式移轉到 Amazon Elastic Kubernetes Service (Amazon EKS)。使用 Amazon MQ 檢索訊息。
B.en: Migrate the container application to Amazon Elastic Kubernetes Service (Amazon EKS). Use Amazon MQ to retrieve the messages.

C.zh: 使用高度可用的 Amazon EC2 執行個體來執行應用程式。使用 Amazon MQ 檢索訊息。
C.en: Use highly available Amazon EC2 instances to run the application. Use Amazon MQ to retrieve the messages.

D.zh: 使用 AWS Lambda 函數執行應用程式。使用 Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) 擷取訊息。
D.en: Use AWS Lambda functions to run the application. Use Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) to retrieve the messages.

A.zh: 錯誤。Amazon ECS 是適合運行容器化應用程式的託管容器服務，但它不直接支援 Kubernetes 工作負載遷移。 AMQP 是一種高階訊息佇列協議，Amazon SQS 不支援 AMQP 協議，因此無法滿足訊息佇列需求。
A.en: Incorrect. Amazon ECS is a managed container service suitable for running containerized applications, but it does not directly support Kubernetes workload migration. AMQP is an advanced message queuing protocol, and Amazon SQS does not support the AMQP protocol and therefore cannot meet the message queuing needs.

B.zh: 正確。Amazon EKS 是一項託管 Kubernetes 服務，直接支援 Kubernetes 工作負載的遷移。 Amazon MQ 支援 AMQP 協議，可以滿足訊息佇列的需求。這個選項是正確的。
B.en: Correct. Amazon EKS is a managed Kubernetes service that directly supports the migration of Kubernetes workloads. Amazon MQ supports the AMQP protocol and can meet the needs of message queues. This option is correct.

C.zh: 錯誤。使用 Amazon EC2 執行個體執行應用程式需要手動管理基礎設施，從而增加了營運開銷。雖然 Amazon MQ 支援 AMQP，但此選項具有較高的操作開銷，且不符合「最低操作開銷」要求。
C.en: Incorrect. Running applications using Amazon EC2 instances requires manual management of the infrastructure, adding operational overhead. Although Amazon MQ supports AMQP, this option has higher operational overhead and does not meet the "minimum operational overhead" requirement.

D.zh: 錯誤。AWS Lambda 是一種無伺服器運算服務，但它不適合執行需要持續運行的容器化應用程式。 Amazon SQS 不支援 AMQP 協議，因此無法滿足訊息佇列的需求。
D.en: Incorrect. AWS Lambda is a serverless computing service, but it is not suitable for running containerized applications that need to run continuously. Amazon SQS does not support the AMQP protocol and therefore cannot meet the needs of message queues.

answer_text.zh: B. 將容器應用程式移轉到 Amazon Elastic Kubernetes Service (Amazon EKS)。使用 Amazon MQ 檢索訊息。
answer_text.en: B. Migrate the container application to Amazon Elastic Kubernetes Service (Amazon EKS). Use Amazon MQ to retrieve the messages.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：B (95%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：Amazon EKS 是一項託管 Kubernetes 服務，直接支援 Kubernetes 工作負載的遷移。 Amazon MQ 支援 AMQP 協議，可以滿足訊息佇列的需求。這個選項是正確的。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: B (95%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Amazon EKS is a managed Kubernetes service that directly supports the migration of Kubernetes workloads. Amazon MQ supports the AMQP protocol and can meet the needs of message queues. This option is correct.

questions.domain: 領域 2：設計高性能架構 (Design High-Performing Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家線上遊戲公司將其平臺託管在跨多個 AWS 區域的網路負載平衡器 (NLB) 後面的 Amazon EC2 執行個體上。 NLB 可以透過 Internet 將請求路由到目標。該公司希望透過減少全球客戶群的端到端載入時間來改善客戶的遊戲體驗。哪種解決方案可以滿足這些要求？
question_text.en: An online gaming company hosts its platform on Amazon EC2 instances behind Network Load Balancers (NLBs) across multiple AWS Regions. The NLBs can route requests to targets over the internet. The company wants to improve the customer playing experience by reducing end-to-end load time for its global customer base. Which solution will meet these requirements?

A.zh: 在每個區域中建立應用程式負載平衡器 (ALB) 以取代現有的 NLB。將現有 EC2 執行個體註冊為每個區域中 ALB 的目標。
A.en: Create Application Load Balancers (ALBs) in each Region to replace the existing NLBs. Register the existing EC2 instances as targets for the ALBs in each Region.

B.zh: 設定 Amazon Route 53 以將同等權重的流量路由到每個區域中的 NLB。
B.en: Configure Amazon Route 53 to route equally weighted traffic to the NLBs in each Region.

C.zh: 在公司擁有大量客戶群的其他區域建立額外的 NLB 和 EC2 執行個體。
C.en: Create additional NLBs and EC2 instances in other Regions where the company has large customer bases.

D.zh: 在 AWS Global Accelerator 中建立標準加速器。將現有 NLB 配置為目標端點。
D.en: Create a standard accelerator in AWS Global Accelerator. Configure the existing NLBs as target endpoints.

A.zh: 錯誤。雖然 ALB 可以提供高級 HTTP/HTTPS 功能，但它無法直接減少全球用戶的延遲。 ALB主要用於應用層負載平衡，問題需要最佳化全域使用者的存取體驗。 ALB無法解決跨區域網路延遲問題。
A.en: Incorrect. Although ALB can provide advanced HTTP/HTTPS functionality, it cannot directly reduce latency for global users. ALB is mainly used for application layer load balancing, and the question requires optimizing the access experience of global users. ALB cannot solve the problem of cross-regional network delay.

B.zh: 錯誤。Route 53 的流量路由策略可以將流量分送到不同區域的 NLB，但無法最佳化網路路徑或減少延遲。 Route 53僅負責DNS解析，不提供加速功能。
B.en: Incorrect. Route 53's traffic routing policy can distribute traffic to NLBs in different regions, but it cannot optimize network paths or reduce latency. Route 53 is only responsible for DNS resolution and cannot provide acceleration functions.

C.zh: 錯誤。雖然增加NLB和EC2實例可以擴展容量，但這並不能解決網路延遲問題。跨地域的網路最佳化需要使用專用的加速服務，而不是簡單地新增資源。
C.en: Incorrect. Although adding NLB and EC2 instances can expand capacity, this does not solve the network latency problem. Cross-region network optimization requires the use of dedicated acceleration services rather than simply adding resources.

D.zh: 正確。AWS Global Accelerator 可以透過使用 AWS 全球網路優化流量路徑來大幅減少網路延遲。它將用戶流量路由到最近的 AWS 邊緣站點，並透過優化路徑將流量傳送到目標區域中的 NLB。這是解決全球用戶存取延遲的最佳方案。
D.en: Correct. AWS Global Accelerator can significantly reduce network latency by optimizing traffic paths using AWS's global network. It routes user traffic to the nearest AWS edge location and sends the traffic via an optimized path to the NLB in the target region. This is the best solution to solve the access delay for global users.

answer_text.zh: D. 在 AWS Global Accelerator 中建立標準加速器。將現有 NLB 配置為目標端點。
answer_text.en: D. Create a standard accelerator in AWS Global Accelerator. Configure the existing NLBs as target endpoints.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：D (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：AWS Global Accelerator 可以透過使用 AWS 全球網路優化流量路徑來大幅減少網路延遲。它將用戶流量路由到最近的 AWS 邊緣站點，並透過優化路徑將流量傳送到目標區域中的 NLB。這是解決全球用戶存取延遲的最佳方案。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: D (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: AWS Global Accelerator can significantly reduce network latency by optimizing traffic paths using AWS's global network. It routes user traffic to the nearest AWS edge location and sends the traffic via an optimized path to the NLB in the target region. This is the best solution to solve the access delay for global users.

questions.domain: 領域 2：設計高性能架構 (Design High-Performing Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司有一個本地應用程序，該應用程式使用 SFTP 從多個供應商收集財務資料。該公司正在遷移到 AWS 雲端。該公司創建了一個使用 Amazon S3 API 上傳供應商文件的應用程式。一些供應商在不支援 S3 API 的舊應用程式上運行其係統。供應商希望繼續使用基於SFTP的應用程式來上傳資料。該公司希望使用託管服務來滿足使用遺留應用程式的供應商的需求。哪種解決方案能夠以最少的營運開銷滿足這些要求？
question_text.en: A company has an on-premises application that uses SFTP to collect financial data from multiple vendors. The company is migrating to the AWS Cloud. The company has created an application that uses Amazon S3 APIs to upload files from vendors. Some vendors run their systems on legacy applications that do not support S3 APIs. The vendors want to continue to use SFTP- based applications to upload data. The company wants to use managed services for the needs of the vendors that use legacy applications. Which solution will meet these requirements with the LEAST operational overhead?

A.zh: 建立 AWS Database Migration Service (AWS DMS) 實例，以將資料從使用舊應用程式的供應商的儲存複製到 Amazon S3。向供應商提供存取 AWS DMS 執行個體的憑證。
A.en: Create an AWS Database Migration Service (AWS DMS) instance to replicate data from the storage of the vendors that use legacy applications to Amazon S3. Provide the vendors with the credentials to access the AWS DMS instance.

B.zh: 為使用舊應用程式的供應商建立 AWS Transfer Family 終端節點。
B.en: Create an AWS Transfer Family endpoint for vendors that use legacy applications.

C.zh: 設定 Amazon EC2 執行個體以執行 SFTP 伺服器。指示使用遺留應用程式的廠商使用SFTP伺服器上傳資料。
C.en: Configure an Amazon EC2 instance to run an SFTP server. Instruct the vendors that use legacy applications to use the SFTP server to upload data.

D.zh: 為使用舊應用程式將檔案上傳至 SMB 檔案共用的供應商設定 Amazon S3 檔案閘道。
D.en: Configure an Amazon S3 File Gateway for vendors that use legacy applications to upload files to an SMB file share.

A.zh: 錯誤。AWS DMS 主要用於資料庫遷移，而非檔案傳輸。不支援SFTP協議，無法滿足供應商使用SFTP上傳資料的需求。
A.en: Incorrect. AWS DMS is primarily used for database migration, not file transfer. It does not support the SFTP protocol and cannot meet the needs of suppliers to upload data using SFTP.

B.zh: 正確。AWS Transfer Family支援SFTP協議，可直接向供應商提供SFTP終端節點，以滿足Mailiu應用程式的需求。正確：這是一項完全託管的服務，營運開銷最小，並且滿足問題要求。
B.en: Correct. AWS Transfer Family supports the SFTP protocol and can directly provide SFTP endpoints to suppliers to meet the needs of Mailiu applications. Correct: This is a fully managed service with minimal operating overhead and meets the question requirements.

C.zh: 錯誤。雖然可以架設一個EC2實例來運行SFTP伺服器來滿足要求，但這需要手動配置和維護，而且運行開銷比較高，不符合問題要求的「最小化運行開銷」。
C.en: Incorrect. Although it is possible to set up an EC2 instance to run an SFTP server to meet the requirements, this requires manual configuration and maintenance, and the operation overhead is relatively high, which does not meet the "minimize operation overhead" required by the question.

D.zh: 錯誤。Amazon S3 檔案閘道支援 SMB 協議，而非 SFTP 協定。 Mailiu 應用程式無法使用 SFTP 將資料上傳至 SMB 檔案共用。
D.en: Incorrect. Amazon S3 File Gateway supports the SMB protocol, not the SFTP protocol. Mailiu application cannot upload data to SMB file share using SFTP.

answer_text.zh: B. 為使用舊應用程式的供應商建立 AWS Transfer Family 終端節點。
answer_text.en: B. Create an AWS Transfer Family endpoint for vendors that use legacy applications.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：B (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：AWS Transfer Family支援SFTP協議，可直接向供應商提供SFTP終端節點，以滿足Mailiu應用程式的需求。正確：這是一項完全託管的服務，營運開銷最小，並且滿足問題要求。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: B (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: AWS Transfer Family supports the SFTP protocol and can directly provide SFTP endpoints to suppliers to meet the needs of Mailiu applications. Correct: This is a fully managed service with minimal operating overhead and meets the question requirements.

questions.domain: 領域 2：設計高性能架構 (Design High-Performing Architectures)

question_text.zh: 行銷團隊想要為即將舉行的綜合運動會製作一場行銷活動。該團隊擁有過去五年的 PDF 格式的新聞報導。團隊需要一個解決方案來提取有關新聞報道內容和情緒的見解。此解決方案必須使用 Amazon Textract 來處理新聞報導。哪種解決方案能夠以最少的營運開銷滿足這些要求？
question_text.en: A marketing team wants to build a campaign for an upcoming multi-sport event. The team has news reports from the past five years in PDF format. The team needs a solution to extract insights about the content and the sentiment of the news reports. The solution must use Amazon Textract to process the news reports. Which solution will meet these requirements with the LEAST operational overhead?

A.zh: 將擷取的見解提供給 Amazon Athena 進行分析。將提取的見解和分析儲存在 Amazon S3 儲存桶中。
A.en: Provide the extracted insights to Amazon Athena for analysis. Store the extracted insights and analysis in an Amazon S3 bucket.

B.zh: 將擷取的見解儲存在 Amazon DynamoDB 表中。使用 Amazon SageMaker 建立情緒模型。
B.en: Store the extracted insights in an Amazon DynamoDB table. Use Amazon SageMaker to build a sentiment model.

C.zh: 將擷取的見解提供給 Amazon Comprehend 進行分析。將分析儲存到 Amazon S3 儲存桶。
C.en: Provide the extracted insights to Amazon Comprehend for analysis. Save the analysis to an Amazon S3 bucket.

D.zh: 將擷取的洞察儲存在 Amazon S3 儲存桶中。使用 Amazon QuickSight 來視覺化和分析資料。
D.en: Store the extracted insights in an Amazon S3 bucket. Use Amazon QuickSight to visualize and analyze the data.

A.zh: 錯誤。提取的見解將提供給 Amazon Athena 進行分析並儲存在 Amazon S3 中。 Amazon Athena 適用於查詢結構化數據，但不直接支援情感分析或內容分類。此選項沒有提及如何進行情緒分析，無法滿足問題要求。錯誤原因：缺乏情緒分析功能。
A.en: Incorrect. Extracted insights are provided to Amazon Athena for analysis and stored in Amazon S3. Amazon Athena is suitable for querying structured data, but does not directly support sentiment analysis or content classification. This option does not mention how to perform sentiment analysis and cannot meet the question requirements. Reason for the error: Lack of sentiment analysis function.

B.zh: 錯誤。擷取的見解儲存在 Amazon DynamoDB 表中，並使用 Amazon SageMaker 建立情緒模型。 Amazon SageMaker 可以建立情緒模型，但需要額外的開發和訓練工作，從而增加了操作複雜性。題目要求「最小營運開銷」，這個選項不符合要求。錯誤原因：操作開銷較大。
B.en: Incorrect. Extracted insights are stored in Amazon DynamoDB tables and Amazon SageMaker is used to build sentiment models. Amazon SageMaker can build emotion models, but requires additional development and training work, increasing operational complexity. The question requires "minimum operational overhead", and this option does not meet the requirements. Reason for the error: The operation overhead is high.

C.zh: 正確。提取的見解將提供給 Amazon Comprehend 進行分析並保存到 Amazon S3。 Amazon Comprehend可以直接進行情感分析和內容分類，滿足主題需求。 Amazon S3 用於儲存分析結果，營運開銷較低。直接滿足題目要求，運行開銷最低。
C.en: Correct. Extracted insights are provided to Amazon Comprehend for analysis and saved to Amazon S3. Amazon Comprehend can directly perform sentiment analysis and content classification, which meets the topic requirements. Amazon S3 is used to store analysis results with low operating overhead. It directly meets the question requirements and has the lowest operating overhead.

D.zh: 錯誤。提取的見解儲存在 Amazon S3 中，並使用 Amazon QuickSight 對資料進行視覺化和分析。 Amazon QuickSight 適用於資料視覺化，但不支援情緒分析或內容分類。此選項沒有提及如何進行情緒分析，無法滿足問題要求。錯誤原因：缺乏情緒分析功能。
D.en: Incorrect. Extracted insights are stored in Amazon S3 and the data is visualized and analyzed using Amazon QuickSight. Amazon QuickSight is suitable for data visualization but does not support sentiment analysis or content classification. This option does not mention how to perform sentiment analysis and cannot meet the question requirements. Reason for the error: Lack of sentiment analysis function.

answer_text.zh: C. 將擷取的見解提供給 Amazon Comprehend 進行分析。將分析儲存到 Amazon S3 儲存桶。
answer_text.en: C. Provide the extracted insights to Amazon Comprehend for analysis. Save the analysis to an Amazon S3 bucket.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：C (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：提取的見解將提供給 Amazon Comprehend 進行分析並保存到 Amazon S3。 Amazon Comprehend可以直接進行情感分析和內容分類，滿足主題需求。 Amazon S3 用於儲存分析結果，營運開銷較低。直接滿足題目要求，運行開銷最低。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: C (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Extracted insights are provided to Amazon Comprehend for analysis and saved to Amazon S3. Amazon Comprehend can directly perform sentiment analysis and content classification, which meets the topic requirements. Amazon S3 is used to store analysis results with low operating overhead. It directly meets the question requirements and has the lowest operating overhead.

questions.domain: 領域 2：設計高性能架構 (Design High-Performing Architectures)

question_text.zh: 本公司的應用程式在位於多個可用區的 Amazon EC2 執行個體上執行。應用程式需要從第三方應用程式獲取即時數據。該公司需要一種資料攝取解決方案，將攝取的原始資料放入 Amazon S3 儲存桶中。哪種解決方案可以滿足這些要求？
question_text.en: A company's application runs on Amazon EC2 instances that are in multiple Availability Zones. The application needs to ingest real-time data from third-party applications. The company needs a data ingestion solution that places the ingested raw data in an Amazon S3 bucket. Which solution will meet these requirements?

A.zh: 建立 Amazon Kinesis 資料流以進行資料擷取。建立 Amazon Kinesis Data Firehose 傳輸流以使用 Kinesis 資料流。指定 S3 儲存桶作為傳輸流的目的地。
A.en: Create Amazon Kinesis data streams for data ingestion. Create Amazon Kinesis Data Firehose delivery streams to consume the Kinesis data streams. Specify the S3 bucket as the destination of the delivery streams.

B.zh: 在 AWS Database Migration Service (AWS DMS) 中建立資料庫遷移任務。指定 EC2 執行個體的複製執行個體作為來源終端節點。指定 S3 儲存桶作為目標端點。設定遷移類型以遷移現有資料並複製正在進行的變更。
B.en: Create database migration tasks in AWS Database Migration Service (AWS DMS). Specify replication instances of the EC2 instances as the source endpoints. Specify the S3 bucket as the target endpoint. Set the migration type to migrate existing data and replicate ongoing changes.

C.zh: 在 EC2 執行個體上建立並配置 AWS DataSync 代理程式。配置 DataSync 任務以將資料從 EC2 執行個體傳輸到 S3 儲存桶。
C.en: Create and configure AWS DataSync agents on the EC2 instances. Configure DataSync tasks to transfer data from the EC2 instances to the S3 bucket.

D.zh: 建立與應用程式的 AWS Direct Connect 連線以進行資料擷取。建立 Amazon Kinesis Data Firehose 傳輸流以使用應用程式中的直接 PUT 操作。指定 S3 儲存桶作為傳輸流的目的地。
D.en: Create an AWS Direct Connect connection to the application for data ingestion. Create Amazon Kinesis Data Firehose delivery streams to consume direct PUT operations from the application. Specify the S3 bucket as the destination of the delivery streams.

A.zh: 正確。Amazon Kinesis Data Streaming 是一項專為即時資料擷取而設計的服務，能夠處理來自第三方應用程式的即時資料。正確：Amazon Kinesis Data Firehose 可以將資料直接從 Kinesis 資料串流傳輸到 Amazon S3。正確：此解決方案完全滿足問題要求，能夠即時攝取資料並將其儲存在S3中。
A.en: Correct. Amazon Kinesis Data Streaming is a service specifically designed for real-time data ingestion, capable of processing real-time data from third-party applications. Correct: Amazon Kinesis Data Firehose can stream data directly from Kinesis data to Amazon S3. Correct: This solution fully meets the question requirements and is able to ingest data in real time and store it in S3.

B.zh: 錯誤。AWS DMS 主要用於資料庫遷移，而非即時資料擷取。問題中沒有提及資料庫相關內容，因此該選項不適用。
B.en: Incorrect. AWS DMS is primarily used for database migration, not real-time data ingestion. There is no mention of database related content in the question, so this option is not applicable.

C.zh: 錯誤。AWS DataSync 主要用於大量資料傳輸，而非即時資料擷取。此問題明確要求即時資料攝取，因此此選項不符合要求。
C.en: Incorrect. AWS DataSync is primarily intended for batch data transfer, not real-time data ingestion. The question explicitly requires real-time data ingestion, so this option does not meet the requirements.

D.zh: 錯誤。AWS Direct Connect 是一項用於建立專線連線的服務。它適用於高頻寬和低延遲的網路連接，但問題沒有提到需要專線連接。錯誤：直接 PUT 操作不是問題中提到的即時資料攝取的最佳解決方案。
D.en: Incorrect. AWS Direct Connect is a service used to establish dedicated line connections. It is suitable for high-bandwidth and low-latency network connections, but the question does not mention the need for dedicated line connections. Wrong: Direct PUT operation is not the best solution for real-time data ingestion mentioned in the question.

answer_text.zh: A. 建立 Amazon Kinesis 資料流以進行資料擷取。建立 Amazon Kinesis Data Firehose 傳輸流以使用 Kinesis 資料流。指定 S3 儲存桶作為傳輸流的目的地。
answer_text.en: A. Create Amazon Kinesis data streams for data ingestion. Create Amazon Kinesis Data Firehose delivery streams to consume the Kinesis data streams. Specify the S3 bucket as the destination of the delivery streams.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：A (78%)； C (22%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：Amazon Kinesis Data Streaming 是一項專為即時資料擷取而設計的服務，能夠處理來自第三方應用程式的即時資料。正確：Amazon Kinesis Data Firehose 可以將資料直接從 Kinesis 資料串流傳輸到 Amazon S3。正確：此解決方案完全滿足問題要求，能夠即時攝取資料並將其儲存在S3中。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: A (78%); C (22%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Amazon Kinesis Data Streaming is a service specifically designed for real-time data ingestion, capable of processing real-time data from third-party applications. Correct: Amazon Kinesis Data Firehose can stream data directly from Kinesis data to Amazon S3. Correct: This solution fully meets the question requirements and is able to ingest data in real time and store it in S3.

questions.domain: 領域 2：設計高性能架構 (Design High-Performing Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司的應用程式正在從多個資料來源接收資料。數據的大小各不相同，並且預計會隨著時間的推移而增加。目前最大大小為 700 KB。隨著更多資料來源的添加，資料量和資料規模不斷增長。該公司決定使用 Amazon DynamoDB 作為應用程式的主資料庫。解決方案架構師需要確定一個能夠處理大數據的解決方案。哪一種解決方案能夠以最高效的方式滿足這些要求？
question_text.en: A company’s application is receiving data from multiple data sources. The size of the data varies and is expected to increase over time. The current maximum size is 700 KB. The data volume and data size continue to grow as more data sources are added. The company decides to use Amazon DynamoDB as the primary database for the application. A solutions architect needs to identify a solution that handles the large data sizes. Which solution will meet these requirements in the MOST operationally efficient way?

A.zh: 建立 AWS Lambda 函數來篩選超出 DynamoDB 專案大小限制的資料。將較大的資料儲存在 Amazon DocumentDB（相容於 MongoDB）資料庫中。
A.en: Create an AWS Lambda function to filter the data that exceeds DynamoDB item size limits. Store the larger data in an Amazon DocumentDB (with MongoDB compatibility) database.

B.zh: 將大數據儲存為物件儲存在 Amazon S3 儲存桶中。在 DynamoDB 表中，建立一個具有指向資料的 S3 URL 屬性的項目。
B.en: Store the large data as objects in an Amazon S3 bucket. In a DynamoDB table, create an item that has an attribute that points to the S3 URL of the data.

C.zh: 將所有傳入的大數據拆分為具有相同分區鍵的項目集合。使用 BatchWriteItem API 操作在單一操作中將資料寫入 DynamoDB 表。
C.en: Split all incoming large data into a collection of items that have the same partition key. Write the data to a DynamoDB table in a single operation by using the BatchWriteItem API operation.

D.zh: 建立一個 AWS Lambda 函數，該函數在將大型物件寫入 DynamoDB 表時使用 gzip 壓縮來壓縮大型物件。
D.en: Create an AWS Lambda function that uses gzip compression to compress the large objects as they are written to a DynamoDB table.

A.zh: 錯誤。雖然 DocumentDB 可以儲存大數據，但此解決方案增加了複雜性，因為需要額外的資料庫管理和 Lambda 函數邏輯。效率不夠：DocumentDB 比使用 S3 的成本和操作複雜度更高。
A.en: Incorrect. Although DocumentDB can store big data, this solution adds complexity as additional database management and Lambda function logic are required. Not efficient enough: DocumentDB has higher costs and operational complexity than using S3.

B.zh: 正確。Amazon S3非常適合儲存大數據對象，成本低且可擴充性高。高效能：透過 DynamoDB 儲存指向 S3 的 URL 解決了 DynamoDB 的大小限制，同時保持資料可存取性。
B.en: Correct. Amazon S3 is very suitable for storing big data objects with low cost and high scalability. Efficient: Storing URLs pointing to S3 via DynamoDB solves DynamoDB's size limitations while maintaining data accessibility.

C.zh: 錯誤。雖然可以透過分割資料來繞過 DynamoDB 的大小限制，但這種方法會導致資料管理複雜性增加。效率不夠：需要額外的邏輯來處理資料拆分和重組。
C.en: Incorrect. While it is possible to bypass DynamoDB's size limits by splitting the data, this approach results in increased data management complexity. Not efficient enough: additional logic is required to handle data splitting and reorganization.

D.zh: 錯誤。即使使用 gzip 壓縮，資料也可能超出 DynamoDB 的大小限制。不夠高效率：壓縮和解壓縮會增加額外的運算開銷。
D.en: Incorrect. Even with gzip compression, data may exceed DynamoDB's size limit. Not efficient enough: Compression and decompression add additional computational overhead.

answer_text.zh: B. 將大數據儲存為物件儲存在 Amazon S3 儲存桶中。在 DynamoDB 表中，建立一個具有指向資料的 S3 URL 屬性的項目。
answer_text.en: B. Store the large data as objects in an Amazon S3 bucket. In a DynamoDB table, create an item that has an attribute that points to the S3 URL of the data.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：B (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：Amazon S3非常適合儲存大數據對象，成本低且可擴充性高。高效能：透過 DynamoDB 儲存指向 S3 的 URL 解決了 DynamoDB 的大小限制，同時保持資料可存取性。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: B (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Amazon S3 is very suitable for storing big data objects with low cost and high scalability. Efficient: Storing URLs pointing to S3 via DynamoDB solves DynamoDB's size limitations while maintaining data accessibility.

questions.domain: 領域 2：設計高性能架構 (Design High-Performing Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司正在將舊應用程式從本地資料中心遷移到 AWS。該應用程式依賴數百個 cron 作業，這些作業在一天中按照不同的重複計劃運行 1 到 20 分鐘。該公司希望有一個解決方案能夠以最少的重構在 AWS 上排程和執行 cron 作業。該解決方案必須支援執行 cron 作業以回應將來的事件。哪種解決方案可以滿足這些要求？
question_text.en: A company is migrating a legacy application from an on-premises data center to AWS. The application relies on hundreds of cron jobs that run between 1 and 20 minutes on different recurring schedules throughout the day. The company wants a solution to schedule and run the cron jobs on AWS with minimal refactoring. The solution must support running the cron jobs in response to an event in the future. Which solution will meet these requirements?

A.zh: 為 cron 作業建立容器映像。使用 Amazon EventBridge Scheduler 建立定期計劃。將 cron 作業任務作為 AWS Lambda 函數運行。
A.en: Create a container image for the cron jobs. Use Amazon EventBridge Scheduler to create a recurring schedule. Run the cron job tasks as AWS Lambda functions.

B.zh: 為 cron 作業建立容器映像。使用 Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) 上的 AWS Batch 和計畫原則來執行 cron 作業。
B.en: Create a container image for the cron jobs. Use AWS Batch on Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) with a scheduling policy to run the cron jobs.

C.zh: 為 cron 作業建立容器映像。使用 Amazon EventBridge Scheduler 建立定期計劃。在 AWS Fargate 上執行 cron 作業任務。
C.en: Create a container image for the cron jobs. Use Amazon EventBridge Scheduler to create a recurring schedule. Run the cron job tasks on AWS Fargate.

D.zh: 為 cron 作業建立容器映像。在 AWS Step Functions 中建立一個工作流程，使用等待狀態在指定時間執行 cron 作業。使用 RunTask 操作在 AWS Fargate 上執行 cron 作業任務。
D.en: Create a container image for the cron jobs. Create a workflow in AWS Step Functions that uses a Wait state to run the cron jobs at a specified time. Use the RunTask action to run the cron job tasks on AWS Fargate.

A.zh: 錯誤。分析：Amazon EventBridge Scheduler 確實可以建立定期規劃，適合執行規劃任務。 AWS Lambda 適合執行短期任務，但問題中所述的 cron 作業可能需要長達 20 分鐘才能運行，這可能會超出 Lambda 的最大執行時間限制（15 分鐘）。因此，Lambda 不適合執行這些 cron 作業。
A.en: Incorrect. Analysis: Amazon EventBridge Scheduler can indeed create periodic plans, which is suitable for running scheduled tasks. AWS Lambda is suitable for running short-term tasks, but the cron jobs stated in the question may take up to 20 minutes to run, which may exceed Lambda's maximum execution time limit (15 minutes). Therefore, Lambda is not suitable for running these cron jobs.

B.zh: 錯誤。分析：AWS Batch適合執行批次任務，但主要用於處理大規模平行運算任務，而不是簡單的排程任務。該問題需要執行 cron 作業，而不是複雜的批次任務，因此 AWS Batch 不是最佳選擇。
B.en: Incorrect. Analysis: AWS Batch is suitable for running batch processing tasks, but it is mainly used to handle large-scale parallel computing tasks, rather than simple scheduled tasks. The question requires running cron jobs, not complex batch processing tasks, so AWS Batch is not the best choice.

C.zh: 正確。分析：Amazon EventBridge Scheduler 可以輕鬆建立定期規劃，適合執行規劃任務。 AWS Fargate 是一種無伺服器容器運行服務，支援執行長期任務，適合執行這些 cron 作業。此選項滿足問題要求並支援未來事件觸發。
C.en: Correct. Analysis: Amazon EventBridge Scheduler can easily create periodic plans, suitable for running scheduled tasks. AWS Fargate is a serverless container running service that supports running long-term tasks and is suitable for running these cron jobs. This option meets the question requirements and supports future event triggering.

D.zh: 錯誤。分析：AWS Step Functions適合建構複雜的工作流程，但問題不需要複雜的工作流程管理。使用Wait狀態來實現定時任務效率較低，並且在支援定時任務方面不如EventBridge Scheduler那麼直接。雖然可以使用RunTask在AWS Fargate上執行任務，但整體方案複雜度較高，不符合「最小重構」的要求。
D.en: Incorrect. Analysis: AWS Step Functions is suitable for building complex workflows, but the question does not require complex workflow management. Using the Wait state to implement scheduled tasks is less efficient and is not as direct as EventBridge Scheduler in supporting scheduled tasks. Although RunTask can be used to run tasks on AWS Fargate, the overall solution is highly complex and does not meet the requirements of "minimal reconstruction".

answer_text.zh: C. 為 cron 作業建立容器映像。使用 Amazon EventBridge Scheduler 建立定期計劃。在 AWS Fargate 上執行 cron 作業任務。
answer_text.en: C. Create a container image for the cron jobs. Use Amazon EventBridge Scheduler to create a recurring schedule. Run the cron job tasks on AWS Fargate.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：C (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：分析：Amazon EventBridge Scheduler 可以輕鬆建立定期規劃，適合執行規劃任務。 AWS Fargate 是一種無伺服器容器運行服務，支援執行長期任務，適合執行這些 cron 作業。此選項滿足問題要求並支援未來事件觸發。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: C (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Analysis: Amazon EventBridge Scheduler can easily create periodic plans, suitable for running scheduled tasks. AWS Fargate is a serverless container running service that supports running long-term tasks and is suitable for running these cron jobs. This option meets the question requirements and supports future event triggering.

questions.domain: 領域 2：設計高性能架構 (Design High-Performing Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司使用 Salesforce。該公司需要將現有資料和正在進行的資料變更從 Salesforce 載入到 Amazon Redshift 進行分析。該公司不希望資料透過公共網際網路傳輸。哪種解決方案能夠以最少的開發工作滿足這些要求？
question_text.en: A company uses Salesforce. The company needs to load existing data and ongoing data changes from Salesforce to Amazon Redshift for analysis. The company does not want the data to travel over the public internet. Which solution will meet these requirements with the LEAST development effort?

A.zh: 建立從 VPC 到 Salesforce 的 VPN 連線。使用 AWS Glue DataBrew 傳輸資料。
A.en: Establish a VPN connection from the VPC to Salesforce. Use AWS Glue DataBrew to transfer data.

B.zh: 建立從 VPC 到 Salesforce 的 AWS Direct Connect 連線。使用 AWS Glue DataBrew 傳輸資料。
B.en: Establish an AWS Direct Connect connection from the VPC to Salesforce. Use AWS Glue DataBrew to transfer data.

C.zh: 在 VPC 中建立到 Salesforce 的 AWS PrivateLink 連線。使用 Amazon AppFlow 傳輸資料。
C.en: Create an AWS PrivateLink connection in the VPC to Salesforce. Use Amazon AppFlow to transfer data.

D.zh: 建立與 Salesforce 的 VPC 對等連線。使用 Amazon AppFlow 傳輸資料。
D.en: Create a VPC peering connection to Salesforce. Use Amazon AppFlow to transfer data.

A.zh: 錯誤。原因：VPN連線雖然可以提供安全傳輸，但仍可能將資料傳輸到公共網路上，無法完全避免資料外洩。此外，AWS Glue DataBrew 是一種資料準備工具，不適合直接傳輸資料。
A.en: Incorrect. Reason: Although VPN connection can provide secure transmission, it may still transmit data to the public Internet and cannot completely avoid data exposure. In addition, AWS Glue DataBrew is a data preparation tool and is not suitable for direct data transfer.

B.zh: 錯誤。原因：AWS Direct Connect 提供專線訪問，避開公共 Internet，但設定 Direct Connect 需要大量的開發和設定工作。此外，AWS Glue DataBrew 仍然不適合資料傳輸。
B.en: Incorrect. Reason: AWS Direct Connect provides dedicated line access, avoiding the public Internet, but setting up Direct Connect requires a significant amount of development and configuration work. Additionally, AWS Glue DataBrew is still not suitable for data transfer.

C.zh: 正確。原因：AWS PrivateLink 提供私有連線以確保資料不會到達公用 Internet。 Amazon AppFlow 是一項專門設計用於與 Salesforce 等 SaaS 應用程式互動的服務。它支援資料傳輸，開發工作量低。
C.en: Correct. Reason: AWS PrivateLink provides private connectivity to ensure that data does not reach the public Internet. Amazon AppFlow is a service specifically designed to interface with SaaS applications such as Salesforce. It supports data transmission and requires low development effort.

D.zh: 錯誤。原因：VPC 對等僅適用於兩個 AWS VPC 之間的 Marsh，無法直接連接到外部服務（例如 Salesforce）。因此，這種做法並不可行。
D.en: Incorrect. Reason: VPC Peering is only applicable to Marsh between two AWS VPCs and cannot be directly connected to external services (such as Salesforce). Therefore, this approach is not feasible.

answer_text.zh: C. 在 VPC 中建立到 Salesforce 的 AWS PrivateLink 連線。使用 Amazon AppFlow 傳輸資料。
answer_text.en: C. Create an AWS PrivateLink connection in the VPC to Salesforce. Use Amazon AppFlow to transfer data.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：C (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：原因：AWS PrivateLink 提供私有連線以確保資料不會到達公用 Internet。 Amazon AppFlow 是一項專門設計用於與 Salesforce 等 SaaS 應用程式互動的服務。它支援資料傳輸，開發工作量低。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: C (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Reason: AWS PrivateLink provides private connectivity to ensure that data does not reach the public Internet. Amazon AppFlow is a service specifically designed to interface with SaaS applications such as Salesforce. It supports data transmission and requires low development effort.

questions.domain: 領域 4：設計成本優化架構 (Design Cost-Optimized Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司最近將其應用程式遷移到 AWS。該應用程式在跨多個可用區的 Auto Scaling 群組中的 Amazon EC2 Linux 執行個體上執行。該應用程式將資料儲存在使用 EFS 標準不頻繁存取儲存的 Amazon Elastic File System (Amazon EFS) 檔案系統中。該應用程式索引公司的檔案。此索引儲存在 Amazon RDS 資料庫中。該公司需要透過一些應用程式和服務更改來優化儲存成本。哪一種解決方案能夠最具成本效益地滿足這些要求？
question_text.en: A company recently migrated its application to AWS. The application runs on Amazon EC2 Linux instances in an Auto Scaling group across multiple Availability Zones. The application stores data in an Amazon Elastic File System (Amazon EFS) file system that uses EFS Standard-Infrequent Access storage. The application indexes the company's files. The index is stored in an Amazon RDS database. The company needs to optimize storage costs with some application and services changes. Which solution will meet these requirements MOST cost-effectively?

A.zh: 建立使用智慧分層生命週期策略的 Amazon S3 儲存桶。將所有檔案複製到 S3 儲存桶。更新應用程式以使用 Amazon S3 API 來儲存和檢索檔案。
A.en: Create an Amazon S3 bucket that uses an Intelligent-Tiering lifecycle policy. Copy all files to the S3 bucket. Update the application to use Amazon S3 API to store and retrieve files.

B.zh: 部署 Amazon FSx for Windows File Server 檔案共用。更新應用程式以使用 CIFS 協定來儲存和檢索檔案。
B.en: Deploy Amazon FSx for Windows File Server file shares. Update the application to use CIFS protocol to store and retrieve files.

C.zh: 部署 Amazon FSx for OpenZFS 檔案系統共用。更新應用程式以使用新的安裝點來儲存和檢索檔案。
C.en: Deploy Amazon FSx for OpenZFS file system shares. Update the application to use the new mount point to store and retrieve files.

D.zh: 建立使用 S3 Glacier 靈活檢索的 Amazon S3 儲存桶。將所有檔案複製到 S3 儲存桶。更新應用程式以使用 Amazon S3 API 來儲存和檢索檔案作為標準檢索。
D.en: Create an Amazon S3 bucket that uses S3 Glacier Flexible Retrieval. Copy all files to the S3 bucket. Update the application to use Amazon S3 API to store and retrieve files as standard retrievals.

A.zh: 正確。。 Amazon S3 智慧分層會根據未知或不斷變化的存取模式自動分層，S3 物件儲存成本低廉，應用程式可透過 S3 API 存取檔案。
A.en: Correct. . Amazon S3 Intelligent-Tiering automatically tiers based on unknown or changing access patterns, S3 object storage is low-cost, and applications can access files through the S3 API.

B.zh: 錯誤。。 Amazon FSx for Windows File Server 針對 Windows SMB 工作負載； Linux 應用程式切換到 CIFS 會增加複雜性，並且無法提供最低的物件儲存成本。
B.en: Incorrect. . Amazon FSx for Windows File Server targets Windows SMB workloads; switching to CIFS for Linux applications adds complexity and does not provide the lowest object storage cost.

C.zh: 錯誤。。 Amazon FSx for OpenZFS 提供高效能檔案系統，但其檔案系統成本通常高於此存取模型的 Amazon S3 智慧分層。
C.en: Incorrect. . Amazon FSx for OpenZFS provides a high-performance file system, but its file system cost is typically higher than Amazon S3 Intelligent-Tiering for this access model.

D.zh: 錯誤。。 S3 Glacier 靈活檢索用於歸檔，檢索時間為幾分鐘到幾小時，不適合以標準方式連續動態讀取文件的應用程式。
D.en: Incorrect. . S3 Glacier Flexible Retrieval is used for archiving and has a retrieval time of minutes to hours, and is not suitable for applications that continuously read files on the fly in a standard manner.

answer_text.zh: A. 建立使用智慧分層生命週期策略的 Amazon S3 儲存桶。將所有檔案複製到 S3 儲存桶。更新應用程式以使用 Amazon S3 API 來儲存和檢索檔案。
answer_text.en: A. Create an Amazon S3 bucket that uses an Intelligent-Tiering lifecycle policy. Copy all files to the S3 bucket. Update the application to use Amazon S3 API to store and retrieve files.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：A (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：。 Amazon S3 智慧分層會根據未知或不斷變化的存取模式自動分層，S3 物件儲存成本低廉，應用程式可透過 S3 API 存取檔案。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: A (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: . Amazon S3 Intelligent-Tiering automatically tiers based on unknown or changing access patterns, S3 object storage is low-cost, and applications can access files through the S3 API.

questions.domain: 領域 3：設計安全架構 (Design Secure Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家機器人公司正在設計醫療手術解決方案。這些機器人將使用先進的感測器、攝影機和人工智慧演算法來感知環境並完成手術。該公司需要 AWS 雲端中的公用負載平衡器來確保與後端服務的無縫通訊。負載平衡器必須能夠根據查詢字串將流量路由到不同的目標群組。流量也必須加密。哪種解決方案可以滿足這些要求？
question_text.en: A robotics company is designing a solution for medical surgery. The robots will use advanced sensors, cameras, and AI algorithms to perceive their environment and to complete surgeries. The company needs a public load balancer in the AWS Cloud that will ensure seamless communication with backend services. The load balancer must be capable of routing traffic based on the query strings to different target groups. The traffic must also be encrypted. Which solution will meet these requirements?

A.zh: 使用具有 AWS Certificate Manager (ACM) 附加憑證的網路負載平衡器。使用基於查詢參數的路由。
A.en: Use a Network Load Balancer with a certificate attached from AWS Certificate Manager (ACM). Use query parameter-based routing.

B.zh: 使用網關負載平衡器。將產生的憑證匯入 AWS Identity and Access Management (IAM)。將憑證附加到負載平衡器。使用基於 HTTP 路徑的路由。
B.en: Use a Gateway Load Balancer. Import a generated certificate in AWS Identity and Access Management (IAM). Attach the certificate to the load balancer. Use HTTP path-based routing.

C.zh: 使用具有從 AWS Certificate Manager (ACM) 附加的憑證的 Application Load Balancer。使用基於查詢參數的路由。
C.en: Use an Application Load Balancer with a certificate attached from AWS Certificate Manager (ACM). Use query parameter- based routing.

D.zh: 使用網路負載平衡器。將產生的憑證匯入 AWS Identity and Access Management (IAM)。將憑證附加到負載平衡器。使用基於查詢參數的路由。
D.en: Use a Network Load Balancer. Import a generated certificate in AWS Identity and Access Management (IAM). Attach the certificate to the load balancer. Use query parameter-based routing.

A.zh: 錯誤。原因：網路負載平衡器（NLB）主要用於處理高效能的TCP/UDP流量，但不支援基於查詢參數的流量產生。基於查詢參數的路由是應用程式負載平衡器 (ALB) 的功能。正確：NLB 可以使用 AWS Certificate Manager (ACM) 來管理 SSL/TLS 憑證。
A.en: Incorrect. Reason: Network Load Balancer (NLB) is mainly used to process high-performance TCP/UDP traffic, but does not support query parameter-based traffic generation. Query parameter-based routing is a function of the Application Load Balancer (ALB). Correct: NLB can use AWS Certificate Manager (ACM) to manage SSL/TLS certificates.

B.zh: 錯誤。原因：閘道負載平衡器主要用於非揮發性流量的透明代理和安全服務，不支援HTTP路徑或查詢參數產生功能。錯誤部分：不建議將憑證匯入 IAM 並將其附加到負載平衡器，AWS Certificate Manager (ACM) 是更合適的工具。
B.en: Incorrect. Reason: Gateway Load Balancer is mainly used for transparent proxy and security services for non-volatile traffic, and does not support the HTTP path or query parameter generation function. Incorrect part: Importing the certificate into IAM and attaching it to the load balancer is not a recommended practice, AWS Certificate Manager (ACM) is a more suitable tool.

C.zh: 正確。原因：Application Load Balancer (ALB) 支援基於參數的高效能查詢功能，並且可以透過 AWS Certificate Manager (ACM) 附加 SSL/TLS 憑證以啟用加密通訊。正確部分：此選項完全滿足題目要求，包括路屬性功能和加密通訊。
C.en: Correct. Reason: Application Load Balancer (ALB) supports high-performance query parameter-based functionality and can attach an SSL/TLS certificate through AWS Certificate Manager (ACM) to enable encrypted communication. Correct part: This option fully meets the question requirements, including road property functions and encrypted communication.

D.zh: 錯誤。原因：Network Load Balancer 不支援基於參數的查詢道路屬性功能，此功能是 Application Load Balancer 的功能。錯誤部分：不建議將憑證匯入 IAM 並將其附加到負載平衡器，AWS Certificate Manager (ACM) 是更合適的工具。
D.en: Incorrect. Reason: Network Load Balancer does not support the query parameter-based road property function, which is a function of Application Load Balancer. Incorrect part: Importing the certificate into IAM and attaching it to the load balancer is not a recommended practice, AWS Certificate Manager (ACM) is a more suitable tool.

answer_text.zh: C. 使用具有從 AWS Certificate Manager (ACM) 附加的憑證的 Application Load Balancer。使用基於查詢參數的路由。
answer_text.en: C. Use an Application Load Balancer with a certificate attached from AWS Certificate Manager (ACM). Use query parameter- based routing.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：C (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：原因：Application Load Balancer (ALB) 支援基於參數的高效能查詢功能，並且可以透過 AWS Certificate Manager (ACM) 附加 SSL/TLS 憑證以啟用加密通訊。正確部分：此選項完全滿足題目要求，包括路屬性功能和加密通訊。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: C (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Reason: Application Load Balancer (ALB) supports high-performance query parameter-based functionality and can attach an SSL/TLS certificate through AWS Certificate Manager (ACM) to enable encrypted communication. Correct part: This option fully meets the question requirements, including road property functions and encrypted communication.

questions.domain: 領域 1：設計彈性架構 (Design Resilient Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司有一個在單一 Amazon EC2 執行個體上執行的應用程式。該應用程式使用在同一 EC2 執行個體上執行的 MySQL 資料庫。該公司需要一個高度可用且可自動擴展的解決方案來處理增加的流量。哪種解決方案可以滿足這些要求？
question_text.en: A company has an application that runs on a single Amazon EC2 instance. The application uses a MySQL database that runs on the same EC2 instance. The company needs a highly available and automatically scalable solution to handle increased traffic. Which solution will meet these requirements?

A.zh: 將應用程式部署到在 Application Load Balancer 後面的 Auto Scaling 群組中執行的 EC2 執行個體。建立具有多個與 MySQL 相容的節點的 Amazon Redshift 叢集。
A.en: Deploy the application to EC2 instances that run in an Auto Scaling group behind an Application Load Balancer. Create an Amazon Redshift cluster that has multiple MySQL-compatible nodes.

B.zh: 將應用程式部署到配置為 Application Load Balancer 後面的目標群組的 EC2 執行個體。建立具有多個執行個體的 Amazon RDS for MySQL 叢集。
B.en: Deploy the application to EC2 instances that are configured as a target group behind an Application Load Balancer. Create an Amazon RDS for MySQL cluster that has multiple instances.

C.zh: 將應用程式部署到在 Application Load Balancer 後面的 Auto Scaling 群組中執行的 EC2 執行個體。為資料庫層建立 Amazon Aurora Serverless MySQL 叢集。
C.en: Deploy the application to EC2 instances that run in an Auto Scaling group behind an Application Load Balancer. Create an Amazon Aurora Serverless MySQL cluster for the database layer.

D.zh: 將應用程式部署到配置為應用程式負載平衡器後面的目標群組的 EC2 執行個體。建立使用 MySQL 連接器的 Amazon ElastiCache for Redis 叢集。
D.en: Deploy the application to EC2 instances that are configured as a target group behind an Application Load Balancer. Create an Amazon ElastiCache for Redis cluster that uses the MySQL connector.

A.zh: 錯誤。準確性分析：Amazon Redshift 是一種資料倉儲解決方案，主要為分析工作負載而設計，而不是為運行 MySQL 等事務資料庫而設計。因此，該選項不適合解決該問題。
A.en: Incorrect. Accuracy Analysis: Amazon Redshift is a data warehouse solution designed primarily for analytical workloads rather than for running transactional databases such as MySQL. Because of this, this option is not suitable for solving the problem.

B.zh: 錯誤。準確度分析：Amazon RDS for MySQL 可以提供高可用性，但擴充性有限。它不會像 Amazon Aurora Serverless 那樣自動擴展以應對流量成長。
B.en: Incorrect. Accuracy analysis: Amazon RDS for MySQL can provide high availability, but its scalability is limited. It does not automatically scale like Amazon Aurora Serverless to cope with traffic increases.

C.zh: 正確。精確度分析：Amazon Aurora Serverless 支援自動擴容，可依流量需求動態調整資料庫容量。同時與Auto Scaling群組和Application Load Balancer結合可以實現高可用性和自動擴展。
C.en: Correct. Accuracy analysis: Amazon Aurora Serverless supports automatic expansion and can dynamically adjust database capacity according to traffic needs. At the same time, the combination with Auto Scaling group and Application Load Balancer can achieve high availability and automatic expansion.

D.zh: 錯誤。Amazon ElastiCache for Redis 是一種記憶體快取解決方案，適合加速資料訪問，但無法取代 MySQL 資料庫的功能。因此，該選項不符合標準。
D.en: Incorrect. Amazon ElastiCache for Redis is an in-memory caching solution that is suitable for accelerating data access, but it cannot replace the functionality of the MySQL database. Because of this, this option does not meet the criteria.

answer_text.zh: C. 將應用程式部署到在 Application Load Balancer 後面的 Auto Scaling 群組中執行的 EC2 執行個體。為資料庫層建立 Amazon Aurora Serverless MySQL 叢集。
answer_text.en: C. Deploy the application to EC2 instances that run in an Auto Scaling group behind an Application Load Balancer. Create an Amazon Aurora Serverless MySQL cluster for the database layer.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：C (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：精確度分析：Amazon Aurora Serverless 支援自動擴容，可依流量需求動態調整資料庫容量。同時與Auto Scaling群組和Application Load Balancer結合可以實現高可用性和自動擴展。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: C (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Accuracy analysis: Amazon Aurora Serverless supports automatic expansion and can dynamically adjust database capacity according to traffic needs. At the same time, the combination with Auto Scaling group and Application Load Balancer can achieve high availability and automatic expansion.

questions.domain: 領域 3：設計安全架構 (Design Secure Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司正計劃將資料移轉到 Amazon S3 儲存桶。資料必須在 S3 儲存桶內靜態加密。加密密鑰必須每年自動輪換。哪種解決方案能夠以最少的營運開銷滿足這些要求？
question_text.en: A company is planning to migrate data to an Amazon S3 bucket. The data must be encrypted at rest within the S3 bucket. The encryption key must be rotated automatically every year. Which solution will meet these requirements with the LEAST operational overhead?

A.zh: 將資料遷移到S3儲存桶。使用 Amazon S3 託管金鑰 (SSE-S3) 的伺服器端加密。使用 SSE-S3 加密金鑰的內建金鑰輪換行為。
A.en: Migrate the data to the S3 bucket. Use server-side encryption with Amazon S3 managed keys (SSE-S3). Use the built-in key rotation behavior of SSE-S3 encryption keys.

B.zh: 建立 AWS Key Management Service (AWS KMS) 客戶託管金鑰。啟用自動密鑰輪換。將 S3 儲存桶的預設加密行為設定為使用客戶管理的 KMS 金鑰。將資料遷移到S3儲存桶。
B.en: Create an AWS Key Management Service (AWS KMS) customer managed key. Enable automatic key rotation. Set the S3 bucket's default encryption behavior to use the customer managed KMS key. Migrate the data to the S3 bucket.

C.zh: 建立 AWS Key Management Service (AWS KMS) 客戶託管金鑰。將 S3 儲存桶的預設加密行為設定為使用客戶管理的 KMS 金鑰。將資料遷移到S3儲存桶。每年手動輪換 KMS 密鑰。
C.en: Create an AWS Key Management Service (AWS KMS) customer managed key. Set the S3 bucket's default encryption behavior to use the customer managed KMS key. Migrate the data to the S3 bucket. Manually rotate the KMS key every year.

D.zh: 使用客戶金鑰材料加密資料。將資料遷移到S3儲存桶。建立不含密鑰材料的 AWS Key Management Service (AWS KMS) 密鑰。將客戶密鑰材料匯入到 KMS 密鑰中。啟用自動密鑰輪換。
D.en: Use customer key material to encrypt the data. Migrate the data to the S3 bucket. Create an AWS Key Management Service (AWS KMS) key without key material. Import the customer key material into the KMS key. Enable automatic key rotation.

A.zh: 錯誤。分析：SSE-S3 提供伺服器端加密，且 Amazon S3 託管金鑰的加密行為是自動的。但是，SSE-S3 不支援用戶控制的密鑰輪換。雖然密鑰定期輪換，但無法滿足「每年自動輪換」的特定要求。因此，該選項不符合題目要求。
A.en: Incorrect. Analysis: SSE-S3 provides server-side encryption, and encryption behavior for Amazon S3 managed keys is automatic. However, SSE-S3 does not support user-controlled key rotation. Although keys are rotated regularly, the specific requirement for "automatic annual rotation" cannot be met. Therefore, this option does not meet the question requirements.

B.zh: 正確。分析：使用 AWS KMS 用戶管理的金鑰可讓您完全控制加密金鑰生命週期。啟用自動密鑰輪換功能後，KMS每年都會自動輪換密鑰以滿足題目要求。將 S3 儲存桶的預設加密行為設定為使用客戶管理的 KMS 金鑰，確保所有資料在遷移後自動加密。此選項滿足問題要求且操作開銷最小。
B.en: Correct. Analysis: Using AWS KMS customer-managed keys gives you complete control over the encryption key lifecycle. After the automatic key rotation function is enabled, KMS will automatically rotate keys every year to meet the question requirements. Set the default encryption behavior for S3 buckets to use customer-managed KMS keys, ensuring all data is automatically encrypted after migration. This option meets the question requirements and has the least operational overhead.

C.zh: 錯誤。分析：手動金鑰輪換增加了操作開銷，不符合「最小操作開銷」的要求。雖然可以滿足加密和輪換要求，但手動執行顯然不是最佳解決方案。
C.en: Incorrect. Analysis: Manual key rotation increases operational overhead and does not meet the requirement of "minimum operational overhead". While encryption and rotation requirements can be met, doing so manually is clearly not the best solution.

D.zh: 錯誤。分析：匯入客戶金鑰資料後，AWS KMS 無法對匯入的金鑰材料執行自動輪調。此選項不符合自動密鑰輪換的要求。此外，導入關鍵材料會增加複雜性和營運開銷，不符合「最低營運開銷」要求。
D.en: Incorrect. Analysis: After importing customer key material, AWS KMS cannot perform automatic rotation on the imported key material. This option does not meet the requirements for Automatic Key Rotation. In addition, importing key material adds complexity and operational overhead and does not meet the "minimum operational overhead" requirement.

answer_text.zh: B. 建立 AWS Key Management Service (AWS KMS) 客戶託管金鑰。啟用自動密鑰輪換。將 S3 儲存桶的預設加密行為設定為使用客戶管理的 KMS 金鑰。將資料遷移到S3儲存桶。
answer_text.en: B. Create an AWS Key Management Service (AWS KMS) customer managed key. Enable automatic key rotation. Set the S3 bucket's default encryption behavior to use the customer managed KMS key. Migrate the data to the S3 bucket.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：B (74%)； A (26%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：分析：使用 AWS KMS 用戶管理的金鑰可讓您完全控制加密金鑰生命週期。啟用自動密鑰輪換功能後，KMS每年都會自動輪換密鑰以滿足題目要求。將 S3 儲存桶的預設加密行為設定為使用客戶管理的 KMS 金鑰，確保所有資料在遷移後自動加密。此選項滿足問題要求且操作開銷最小。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: B (74%); A (26%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Analysis: Using AWS KMS customer-managed keys gives you complete control over the encryption key lifecycle. After the automatic key rotation function is enabled, KMS will automatically rotate keys every year to meet the question requirements. Set the default encryption behavior for S3 buckets to use customer-managed KMS keys, ensuring all data is automatically encrypted after migration. This option meets the question requirements and has the least operational overhead.
